arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham preview: Clement confident of memorable night
arts.sum: a former Celtic boss - is all too aware of the hostile atmosphere that will greet him when his Tottenham side travel to Ibrox to face Rangers on Thursday. They have won only one of their last seven matches - a remarkable 4-0 victory at Manchester City - amid a gruelling fixture list and a growing number of absentees.

arts.ttl: Rangers vs Tottenham Europa League score predicted as pressure mounts on Ange Postecoglou
arts.sum: Tottenham will be looking to avoid a fifth game without a win when they take on Rangers in the Europa League later today. Attention turns back to the Europa League later today for the Lilywhites as they travel to Scotland to take on Rangers.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou insists 'emotional' Cristian Romero was WRONG to criticise Tottenham's board - and reveals how showdown talks have gone between the club and player after he hit out at Daniel Levy
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou insists Cristian Romero has wrong to criticise Tottenham 's board over a perceived lack of investment but sympathises with his 'emotional' outburst.

arts.ttl: Collymore’s column: Spurs need a solid defence, Nuno deserves plaudits and much more
arts.sum: In his exclusive column for CaughtOffside, former Aston Villa attacker Stan Collymore discusses some of football’s biggest talking points, including why Tottenham won’t win anything without a solid defence, why Nuno Espirito Santo deserves the plaudits, why Enzo Maresca is the right man at the right time for Chelsea and much more. — Tottenham won’t […] The post Collymore’s column: Spurs need a solid defence, Nuno deserves plaudits and much more appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Radu Dragusin explains how he's going to help Archie Gray and what he's learned from Postecoglou
arts.sum: I'm looking forward to it honestly, because I heard about the atmosphere here also, you know playing these European nights, it's a really nice way of improving, of experiencing this kind of pressure, let's say, with this atmosphere. We are a group of players with quality that I trust a lot, and, regardless of any injury problems we will go out there and do our best and try to play our football.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou provides Cristian Romero and Micky van de Ven Tottenham injury update
arts.sum: The Australian said: "Not much better to be fair… obviously with the weekend’s fall-out Romero and Van De Ven, we’re still getting some clarity around their prognosis, but both have picked up injuries that will keep them out again. So, with Postecoglou confirming Romero and Van de Ven will not be available for the clash at Rangers, it could be Radu Dragusin and Archie Gray starting at centre-back for the Lilywhites.
